改用 UTF-8 编码获取准确的文件名和修改时间：


---

<tool-use data-tool-type="shell" data-tool-name="run_terminal_command_v2">
<details><summary>Tool use: **run_terminal_command_v2** • Run command: [Console]::OutputEncoding = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8; $cutoff = (Get-Date).AddDays(-7); Get-ChildItem -Path "d:\数字分身2\数字分身\AI产出" -Recurse -Filter "*.md" -File | Where-Object { $_.LastWriteTime -ge $cutoff } | Select-Object @{N='Path';E={$_.FullName.Replace("d:\数字分身2\数字分身\","")}}, LastWriteTime | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending</summary>

```bash
[Console]::OutputEncoding = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8; $cutoff = (Get-Date).AddDays(-7); Get-ChildItem -Path "d:\数字分身2\数字分身\AI产出" -Recurse -Filter "*.md" -File | Where-Object { $_.LastWriteTime -ge $cutoff } | Select-Object @{N='Path';E={$_.FullName.Replace("d:\数字分身2\数字分身\","")}}, LastWriteTime | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending
```
</details>
</tool-use>

<details><summary>Tool use: **run_terminal_command_v2** • Run command: $base = "d:\数字分身2\数字分身\AI产出"; Get-ChildItem $base -Recurse -Filter "*.md" -File | ForEach-Object { $rel = $_.FullName.Replace("d:\数字分身2\数字分身\AI产出\", ""); "$($_.LastWriteTime.ToString('yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm')) | $rel" } | Sort-Object -Descending</summary>

<details><summary>Tool use: **run_terminal_command_v2** • Run command: Get-ChildItem "d:\数字分身2\数字分身\AI产出" -Recurse -Filter "*.md" -File | Select-Object -First 20 | ForEach-Object { "$($_.LastWriteTime.ToString('yyyy-MM-dd')) $($_.Name)" }</summary>
